title: senecio sacramentanus
intro: Senecio sacramentanus, also known as the Sacramento ragwort, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio sacramentanus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Senecio sacramentanus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
